MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TARA C. BURKE; AND TO ENTER DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to provide a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
